evidence.claim: The system alerts when stock for any blood type falls below 5 units.
evidence.fact: The system raises a shortage alert whenever available stock of any blood type falls below 5 units.
evidence.user_story_span: be alerted when stock for any blood type falls below 5 units
evidence.fact_span: raises a shortage alert whenever available stock of any blood type falls below 5 units

evidence.claim: The alert threshold is defined as 5 units for any blood type.
evidence.fact: A shortage alert is triggered whenever the available stock for any blood type drops below five units.
evidence.user_story_span: The alert threshold is defined as 5 units for any blood type

evidence.claim: The system monitors blood inventory levels per ABO/Rh type.
evidence.fact: It automatically logs incoming blood units and updates available stock counts based on type and Rh factor.
evidence.user_story_span: monitor blood inventory levels per ABO/Rh type
evidence.fact_span: updates available stock counts based on type and Rh factor
